name: WireGuard
description: Fast, modern WireGuard VPN with a web UI for managing peers (wg-easy)

ports.name: wg-easy_51820
ports.review_note: WireGuard sends no response before a valid Noise handshake, so it cannot be used for UDP reflection/amplification. Non-amplifiable. Reviewed 2026-06.

value.title: Admin password
value.description: Password for the wg-easy web UI where you add and manage VPN peers.
